summary: REJECT: test suite has 1 failure (test_notebook_executes_without_error — ValueError: Missing column 'timestamp_utc' in station_daily.csv). This is a pre-existing issue unrelated to the reviewed commit 2434e33, which correctly fixes resampling.py to skip unknown columns via try/except. The fix itself looks sound — wrapping policy.for_column() and logging skipped columns at DEBUG level. However, Lisa protocol requires REJECT when tests fail. Additionally, the Phase 9 exit gate test (test_pipeline_execution.py) still does not exist. Ralph needs to: (1) fix the notebook test by ensuring station_daily.csv has a timestamp_utc column, and (2) create the missing exit gate test.
